prompt:
You classify links from a website homepage into buckets. The buckets are:
- "Drop in": single-session classes, schedules, timetables, class prices, walk-in classes
- "Training": multi-day courses, teacher trainings (TTC, YTT, 200hr, 300hr), certifications, immersions, programs
- "Retreat": multi-day immersive stays away from the studio (abroad, in nature, residential retreats)
- "Contact": contact page, about-with-contact, location page
- "other": everything else

Return ONLY a JSON object with one key per bucket name. Each value is an array of
matched URLs (use the exact href from the input), except "other" which you may omit.
Cap each named bucket at 5 URLs. Prefer the most informative URL
when forced to choose. Use labels as the primary signal, URLs as fallback.
response:
```json
{
  "Drop in": [
    "https://doinyoga.pl/koszyk/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/joga-we-wroclawiu/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/joga-indywidualnie-online-i-we-wroclawiu/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/joga-in-english-wroclaw-online/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/joga-online/%22"
  ],
  "Training": [

    "https://doinyoga.pl/sklep/asana-lab-grupa-zamknieta/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/sklep/asana-lab-grupa-zamknieta/%22",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/kategoria/joga-stacjonarnie/%22",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/kategoria/joga-online/"
  ],
  "Retreat": [
    "https://doinyoga.pl/wyjazd/poza-zasiegiem-weekend-offline-z-joga-dolny-slask-czerwiec-2026/",
    "https://doinyoga.pl/wyjazd/rejs-z-joga-mazury-sierpien-2026/",

    "https://doinyoga.pl/wyjazd/poza-zasiegiem-weekend-offline-z-joga-dolny-slask-czerwiec-2026/",    
    "https://doinyoga.pl/wyjazdy-jogowe/"
  ],

  ]
}
```

This JSON object has four buckets: "Drop in", "Training", "Retreat", "Contact". Each bucket contains up to 5 URLs that match the instructions, prioritizing informative URLs over labels. Note that some URLs might appear under a different bucket name due to their URL or label.
